# GitHub repository page — About section

GitHub does **not** read this file automatically. Copy the values below into the web UI.

**Where to edit:** On the repository home page, click the **gear icon** next to **About**, or go to **Settings → General** and use the **Description** / **Website** fields. Add **Topics** from the main repo page.

---

## Description (short — paste into About)

```
LoRaWAN device & gateway simulator (1.0.x) for integration tests and teaching. Optional ChirpStack v4, React control UI, OpenClaw plugin, multi-gateway.
```

*(Single line; you may shorten further if needed.)*

---

## Website (optional)

Leave empty, or set to your project / documentation URL if you publish one later.

---

## Topics (add individually on GitHub)

Suggested tags (type each in the Topics field or paste-comma-separated where supported):

`lorawan` · `chirpstack` · `simulator` · `lora` · `iot` · `openclaw` · `nodejs` · `mqtt` · `gateway-bridge`

---

## README language

- **Default** (shown on the repo home): English — root [`README.md`](../README.md).
- **Chinese:** [`README.zh-CN.md`](../README.zh-CN.md).

开源 LoRaWAN 设备与网关模拟器（1.0.x），用于联调与教学；可选 ChirpStack v4、React 控制台、OpenClaw 插件与多网关。
